text: As I stand before the glass doors, peering into the colorful R+D exhibit, I find myself at the intersection of curiosity and finality. The phrase "The End" echoes in my mind—does it signal the closing of a chapter, or the threshold of something new? The room beyond seems quiet and contemplative, filled with the artifacts of innovation. I feel a gentle melancholy, tinged with hope, as if bidding farewell to one set of ideas while sensing that another is waiting just beyond my reach, ready to be explored.
